person.name: Walter Calverley, Esq.

memoryArtifacts.headline: Calverley William and Agnes Tempest marriage record in Calverley Charters 1442 pg 251
memoryArtifacts.description:
Charter #348  pg 251
Indenture made between Sir John Tempest, knight, of the one part, and Walter Calverley, esquire, of the other part, being an agreement for the marriage of William Calverley, son and heir apparent of Walter and Agnes Tempest, daughter of Sir John. (before the Pentecost next). It also names Walter's wife as Elisabeth and his father as Sir Walter Calverley, knight. It names William's brothers as Thomas and Robert.

burialPlace.address: Saint Wilfrid Churchard, Calverley, Yorkshire, England

person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
Biography
Walter Calverley, Esq., son and heir of Walter Calverley (alias Scott), Knt., by his third marriage to Joan Bigod, was born in 1402.

He held lands at Calverley, Halliwell and Pudsley, Yorkshire and Clareburgh, Hayton and Wellom, Nottighamshire.

Walter married first by settlement dated 1 March 1415 Elizabeth Markenfield, daughter of Thomas Markenfield of Markenfield, Yorkshire.

They had three sons and eight daughters:
1.) Robert Calverley

2.) Thomas Calverley

3.) Joan Calverley

4.) Sir William Calverley d. 1488

5.) Margaret Calverley b. c 1422 wife of Thomas Clapham

6.) Alice Calverley b. c 1425 wife of Gilbert Leigh

7.) Beatrix Calverley b. c 1440 wife of Tristram Bolling

8.) Anne Calverley

9.) Amice Calverley wife of Robert Baildon

10.) Elizabeth Calverley, a nun

11.) Isabel wife of John Slingsby

His wife, Elizabeth, was living in 1442. Her date of death is unknown, but she predeceased Walter as he remarried Katherine _____, widow of Robert Drax and Richard Burton of South Mitford, Yorkshire.

Walter left a will deate 6 April 1466 and proved 5 March 1466/7, requesting burial in the church of Calverley, Yorkshire. His wife survived him and was living in 1472.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Walter Calverley, Esq.於大約1398年出生在英國越可爾卡爾福利時，他的父親Walter de Claverley60歲，母親Joan Bigod29歲。他於1415年3月1日與Elizabeth Markenfield結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和9個女兒的父母。他去世於1467年3月5日之前在他的家鄉，埋葬在英國越可爾卡爾福利。

nameMeanings.name: Calverley,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Yorkshire and Lancashire): habitational name from Calverley in Yorkshire, named with Old English calfra (genitive plural of calf ‘calf’) + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. Alternatively, in some instances the name may be a variant of the habitational name Calveley, from a place so called in Cheshire (with the same meaning as above), or from Calverleigh in Devon, meaning ‘the clearing of the bare wood’ (Old English calu ‘bare, bald’ + wudu ‘wood’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’).

variants.name: Calvery
meanings: Possibly an Americanized form of German Kälberer(see Kalberer ).

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Walter Calverley, Esq. was born about 1398, in Calverley, Yorkshire, England, his father, Walter de Claverley, was 60 and his mother, Joan Bigod, was 29. He married Elizabeth Markenfield on 1 March 1415. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 9 daughters. He died before 5 March 1467, in his hometown, and was buried in Calverley, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Walter Calverley, Esq. est né environ 1398, à Calverley, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Walter de Claverley, avait 60 ans et sa mère, Joan Bigod, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Markenfield le 1 mars 1415. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 9 filles. Il est décédé avant 5 mars 1467, dans sa ville natale, et a été enterré à Calverley, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Walter Calverley, Esq. um 1398 in Calverley, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Walter de Claverley 60 und seine Mutter Joan Bigod 29. Er hat am 1. ja.lifeSummary: Walter Calverley, Esq.が約1398年にイギリスヨークシュアイアカルバーリーで生まれた時，父Walter de Claverleyは60歳，母Joan Bigodは29歳であった。1415年3月1日にElizabeth Markenfieldと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と9人の娘の親であった。彼は1467年3月5日以前に故郷で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアカルバーリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Walter Calverley, Esq.(이)가 대략 1398년 영국 요르크실르 캘벌리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Walter de Claverley(은)는 60세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Bigod(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1415년 3월 1일 Elizabeth Markenfield(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 아홉 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1467년 3월 5일 이전 그의 고향에서 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 캘벌리에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Walter Calverley, Esq. родился около 1398 г. в местности калвирли, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Walter de Claverley было 60 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Bigod, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Markenfield 1 марта 1415 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 9 дочерей. Он умер перед 5 марта 1467 г. в его родном городе и был похоронен в местности калвирли, еркшир, Англия.
